name: Tibet Tourism Co.,Ltd
summary: Tibet Tourism Co.,Ltd provides tourism services in China. The company operates scenic spots, including the Yarlung Zangbo Grand Canyon in Linzhi City, Tibet Autonomous Region, the Shenshen Lake Ba Songcuo, the Benzri Mountain, the Lulang Huahai Ranch, and the Ali Area of the Tibet Autonomous Region. It also operates hotels, such as Himalaya Lhasa, Himalaya Grand Canyon, Himalaya Bazoncuo, Himalayan Pran, Himalaya Gang Rinpoche, Tarchin Xixia Bangma Xiangke, and Payang Town Xixiabangma, as well as Lulang Huahai Forest Villa Resort, and Ba Songcuo self-driving and outdoor camp. In addition, the company provides travel agency, tourist passenger transportation, and other tourism services. Tibet Tourism Co.,Ltd was founded in 1996 and is based in Lhasa, China.
